advancements.healpgood.crystal_heart_use: Upgrade your Health with a Crystal Heart, albeit temporarily
advancements.healpgood.heart_container_u: Upgrade your Health with a Heart Container, permanently
advancements.healpgood.empty_heart_conta: Turn one of your Hearts into a heart container
advancements.healpgood.max_health.desc: Consume the Maximum Possible amount of Heart Crystals and Heart Containers
advancements.healpgood.into_ender.desc: Relieve an Ender creature of their Soul
commands.healpgood.healthSet.success.mul: Successfully Modified the Health of %s players
death.attack.empty_heart_container: %s Didn't have enough hearts to spare
healpgood.main.config.seasonalHearts.des:
This selection will determine the appearance of §dHeart pickups§r.

§2Dynamic§r makes Hearts change based on Seasons.

§2Default§r keeps hearts at their regular look.

All other options enable seasonal textures year-round
healpgood.main.config.dragonDrops.desc: If true, the §5Ender Dragon§r will drop Hearts similar to how it drops §2XP
healpgood.main.config.heartLanternX.desc: The Max §2Horizontal Distance§r you can be from a §dHeart Lantern§r to receive Regeneration
healpgood.main.config.heartLanternY.desc: The Max §2Vertical Distance§r you can be from a §dHeart Lantern§r to receive Regeneration
healpgood.hearts.config.regularDropChanc: The §2Default Chance§r for a Mob to drop Hearts on Death
healpgood.hearts.config.passiveAugment.d: This Amount is §cSubtracted§r from the §2Default Drop Chance§r if a Mob is Passive
healpgood.hearts.config.healthAugment.de: The Amount here will be multiplied by a mobs §dTotal Health§r, and then added to the §2Default Drop Chance§r
healpgood.hearts.config.healthToHearts.d:
This will be used to determine the §dAmount of Health§r required to drop §2Extra Hearts.§r

§dHealth§r §a/ Amount§r = §bHearts


§cSetting this to 0 prevents extra hearts from dropping
healpgood.hearts.config.chanceDecay.desc: Everytime a mob drops an §2Extra Heart§r, the chance for them to drop another will be §cdecreased§r by this amount!
healpgood.health_upgrades.config.healOnR: If §4False§r, your §dPermanent Hearts§r will remain, but won't be replenished when you respawn
healpgood.health_upgrades.config.heartCr:
The Maximum amount of §2Heart Crystals§r that a player can consume

§b(Max Temp Hearts)
healpgood.health_upgrades.config.heartCo:
The Maximum amount of §2Heart Containers§r that a player can consume

§b(Max Perm Hearts)
